findReplace.title: Find and Replace Text
findReplace.description: Find and replace text matching your search criteria with support for regex and case sensitivity
findReplace.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
findReplace.errorCopyFailed: Failed to copy text to clipboard

addPrefixSuffix.title: Add Prefix/Suffix to Lines
addPrefixSuffix.description: Insert a prefix and/or suffix to the content of each line in your text
addPrefixSuffix.prefixPlaceholder: Enter prefix to add to each line...
addPrefixSuffix.suffixPlaceholder: Enter suffix to add to each line...
addPrefixSuffix.inputPlaceholder: Enter your text here (each line will be processed separately)...
addPrefixSuffix.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
addPrefixSuffix.errorCopyFailed: Failed to copy text to clipboard

lineBreakManager.title: Add/Remove Line Breaks
lineBreakManager.description: Add new line breaks and/or remove existing line breaks within your text's formatting
lineBreakManager.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
lineBreakManager.errorCopyFailed: Failed to copy text to clipboard

removeDuplicateLines.title: Remove Duplicate Lines
removeDuplicateLines.description: Remove/delete all duplicate lines within your text/list while preserving unique content
removeDuplicateLines.inputPlaceholder: Enter your text here (one item per line)...
removeDuplicateLines.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
removeDuplicateLines.errorCopyFailed: Failed to copy text to clipboard

removeEmptyLines.title: Remove Empty Lines
removeEmptyLines.description: Remove/delete all empty lines within your text/list to clean up formatting
removeEmptyLines.whitespaceOnlyLabel: Also remove lines with only whitespace (spaces, tabs)
removeEmptyLines.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
removeEmptyLines.errorCopyFailed: Failed to copy text to clipboard

removeExtraSpaces.title: Remove Extra Spaces
removeExtraSpaces.description: Remove leading/trailing/extra/all white-spaces from your text with various options
removeExtraSpaces.toastTrimLines: Removed leading and trailing spaces from each line
removeExtraSpaces.toastExtraSpaces: Removed extra spaces (multiple consecutive spaces collapsed to single space)
removeExtraSpaces.toastAllWhitespace: Removed all whitespace (spaces, tabs, line breaks)
removeExtraSpaces.toastNormalize: Normalized whitespace (trimmed lines and removed extra spaces)
removeExtraSpaces.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
removeExtraSpaces.errorCopyFailed: Failed to copy text to clipboard

emDashReplacer.title: Em Dash Replacer
emDashReplacer.subtitle: Replace Em Dashes (—) in your text with commas, spaces, regular dashes, or colons
emDashReplacer.inputDescRich: Enter or paste rich text containing Em Dashes (—)
emDashReplacer.inputDescSimple: Enter or paste plain text containing Em Dashes (—)
emDashReplacer.outputDesc: Text with Em Dashes replaced by your selected character
emDashReplacer.inputPlaceholder: Enter text with Em Dashes (—) here...
emDashReplacer.aboutEmDash: Em Dash (—): A punctuation mark longer than a regular hyphen (-) and en dash (–).
emDashReplacer.aboutUses: Common uses: To indicate a break in thought, or to replace commas, parentheses, or colons.
emDashReplacer.errorEnterText: Please enter some text to process
emDashReplacer.errorNoOutput: No output text available to copy
emDashReplacer.errorCopyFailedDesc: Failed to copy text to clipboard
emDashReplacer.toastSuccess: Em dashes have been replaced successfully
